name: website-auditor-mcp
description: AI visibility + site audits: see if ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude & Gemini recommend a website.
long_description: Website Auditor checks and monitors how a website shows up in AI assistants (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini) alongside a standard technical audit (SEO, security headers, broken links, performance). It returns an AI-visibility score, what changed over time, competitor comparisons, and specific fixes. Free tools work with any valid key; monitoring, deltas, and benchmarks require a Website Auditor Pro subscription.

wa_api_key.title: Website Auditor API Key
wa_api_key.description: Your per-user API key (starts with 'wa_') minted from a Website Auditor account at https://website-auditor.io. Free tools work with any valid key; Pro tools require an active subscription.

tools.name: get_ai_visibility
tools.description: Check AI visibility [read-only]. Check how visible a website is to AI assistants right now. Returns an overall AI-visibility score (0-100), a per-engine breakdown (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, Gemini), and the top competitor appearing in place of the site.

tools.name: run_audit
tools.description: Run a full audit [read-only]. Run a full one-time audit of a website — AI visibility plus SEO, security headers, broken links, and performance. Returns a scored summary across categories and a link to the full report.

tools.name: get_changes
tools.description: What changed since last check [read-only]. Report what changed in a website's AI visibility and audit since it was last checked. Requires the domain to be tracked. Returns deltas: score movement, engines gained/lost, competitors that moved, and new or resolved issues.

tools.name: compare_competitors
tools.description: Compare against competitors [read-only]. Compare a website's AI visibility head-to-head against named competitors. Returns each competitor's score and where they appear that the site does not. Quota-aware: caps the audit fan-out to the remaining daily quota and reports any competitors it had to skip.

tools.name: track_site
tools.description: Start/stop monitoring [destructive: writes tracking state]. Start (or stop) ongoing weekly monitoring of a website's AI visibility on a schedule. Establishes the history that get_changes reads from.

tools.name: untrack_site
tools.description: Stop monitoring [destructive: writes tracking state]. Stop ongoing monitoring of a website's AI visibility and free up a monitoring slot. Idempotent.

tools.name: list_tracked_sites
tools.description: List monitored sites [read-only]. List the websites currently being monitored for AI visibility on a schedule. Returns each tracked domain with its cadence and active state, plus slots used and remaining.

tools.name: get_monitoring_status
tools.description: Monitoring status summary [read-only]. Get a glanceable summary of monitoring status across all tracked websites — latest AI-visibility score, when each was last audited and next runs, and the most recent change since the prior check.

tools.name: get_benchmark
tools.description: Benchmark vs industry/geo [read-only]. Benchmark a website's AI visibility against its industry and location. Returns percentile, peer median, sample size, and a position summary rather than an absolute number. Requires Pro.

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Prioritized fixes [read-only]. Get specific, prioritized fixes to raise a website's AI-visibility and audit scores. Returns ranked actions, each with why it matters, expected impact, and effort. Requires Pro.

tools.name: generate_schema
tools.description: Generate JSON-LD schema [read-only]. Generate ready-to-paste structured data (JSON-LD) tailored to a website, to improve how AI assistants and search engines understand it. Returns valid JSON-LD plus placement notes. Requires Pro.

tools.name: get_report
tools.description: Shareable report + badge [read-only]. Get a shareable report URL and the embeddable "Audited by Website Auditor" badge snippet for a website. Returns a link and an HTML badge snippet. Requires Pro.
